title: Synthetic-check hook not implemented (sp001 Task 3 false-closed)
description: RETRO finding from sp001: Task wd2-267382-aqo.3 was closed as APPROVED but tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py + the synthetic-check hook in src/lib/vault_rotate.py do not exist. The core us003 AC — zero 5xx during rotation window — has no test coverage.

title: vault_rotate.py orchestration module not implemented (sp001 Task 2 false-closed)
description: RETRO finding from sp001: Task wd2-267382-aqo.2 was closed as APPROVED but src/lib/vault_rotate.py + tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py do not exist on disk. Story us003 acceptance — 5-minute overlap window, alias expiry at T+5min, restart-completes-pending — is not met by the current shipped code. Needs a new sp### to actually deliver the orchestration module per the original plan.

title: Make vault timeout configurable (TODO in vault.py)
description: RETRO finding from sp001: src/lib/vault.py lines 49-51 carry a TODO — set_timeout(timeout_ms) currently hardcoded to 5000ms which is too short for the European region. Needs to become configurable. Out of scope for the rotation work but tracked here.

title: Cross-region failover for credential rotation (discovered during sp001)
description: RETRO finding from sp001 Task 3 notes: rotation correctness across regions is unverified. Current synthetic check is single-region. Likely needs a new us### for cross-region failover behavior and an sp### to deliver it.
